articles.subtitle: Practical foundation for small business owners
overview: This course explains core financial decisions in simple terms so entrepreneurs can run day-to-day operations confidently.
It focuses on practical bookkeeping, pricing, margins, and cash-flow awareness that can be applied immediately.
learningObjectives: Track sales, expenses, and margin clearly
Build a simple monthly budget and review routine
Use numbers for better pricing decisions

articleSections.heading: Why financial literacy matters
paragraphs: When business owners understand their numbers, they can avoid preventable losses and improve cash control.
Financial literacy does not require accounting mastery. It starts with consistent habits and basic business math.

articleSections.heading: The minimum records to keep
paragraphs: A strong baseline is enough for most small operations: daily sales, expenses, stock movement, and supplier payments.
The aim is clarity and consistency, not complexity.

faq.question: Do I need accounting software to apply this course?
faq.answer: No. You can start with paper or a spreadsheet and upgrade later.

faq.question: Who should take this course?
faq.answer: Any founder, shop owner, or team lead handling day-to-day business decisions.

articles.subtitle: Customer trust and retention in action
overview: This course helps teams create consistent service quality across every customer touchpoint.
It combines communication skills, response frameworks, and complaint recovery practices.

articleSections.heading: Service standards that customers notice
paragraphs: Customers remember speed, clarity, and respect. Teams that formalize these standards improve trust quickly.
A simple service checklist can align all staff across shifts.

faq.question: Can this be used for online and offline businesses?
faq.answer: Yes. The framework is channel-agnostic and works for both.

defaultArticle.subtitle: Complete course article
overview: This article-style page presents the full course context, practical takeaways, and quick-reference guidance.
Use it as your study companion while viewing or downloading the PDF.
learningObjectives: Use a simple review checklist after completion

articleSections.heading: Course context
paragraphs: This resource is designed to give a practical path from foundational concepts to direct application.
Read each section as an operational guide, not only as theory.

articleSections.heading: Implementation guide
paragraphs: Apply one recommendation at a time and measure the impact weekly.
Sustainable improvement comes from repetition, reflection, and team alignment.

faq.question: Is this page a replacement for the PDF?
faq.answer: No. It complements the PDF by making key points easy to consume like a blog article.

faq.question: Can I share this with my team?
faq.answer: Yes. Use this page as a quick onboarding and discussion reference.
